baseUrl.description: Snapshot of the datasource URL written by the LogScale token authentication component (src/components/ConfigEditor/ConfigEditor.tsx:155). Never read by the backend, which always reads settings.URL (pkg/plugin/settings.go:38). Preserved for round-trip fidelity.

dataLinks.description: Add links to existing fields. Links will be shown in log row details next to the field value.

datasourceUid.description: UID of a Grafana data source. When set, the derived data link is treated as an internal link to that data source and the URL field is interpreted as a Query.

field.description: Can be exact field name or a regex pattern that will match on the field name.

label.description: Use to provide a meaningful label to the data matched in the regex

matcherRegex.description: Use to parse and capture some part of the log message. You can use the captured groups in the template.

httpHeaders.description: Additional HTTP headers sent with every request. Header names are stored in jsonData (httpHeaderName<N>); header values are write-only in secureJsonData (httpHeaderValue<N>).

incrementalQueryOverlapWindow.description: Time window to re-fetch on each incremental query to catch late-arriving data (e.g. "10m", "30s", "1h"). Changes take effect after saving and reloading.

incrementalQuerying.description: Results may be incomplete or incorrect in some cases. On auto-refresh, query new data and merge it with the cached result. This applies only to relative time ranges without aggregation functions.

keepCookies.description: Grafana proxy deletes forwarded cookies by default. Specify cookies by name that should be forwarded to the data source.

mode.description: Select the data source mode. NGSIEM mode only supports OAuth2 client secret authentication.
